content: SylhetStay completely transformed my student life. The WiFi is fast, meals are great and the community is wonderful. Highly recommended for anyone studying in Sylhet!
The premium room is worth every taka. Clean, quiet, air-conditioned and the staff are super responsive. I feel safe and comfortable here.
Best budget hostel in Sylhet. The shared room is clean and my roommates are friendly. The study lounge helped me ace my exams!
